seoTitle: Peel Island vs Pelham — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Peel Island and Pelham. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Peel Island vs Pelham: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Peel Island and Pelham.
heading: Peel Island vs Pelham — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Peel Island, Queensland and Pelham, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Peel Island has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Pelham (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Peel Island or Pelham safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Peel Island has a flood risk score of 29/100, while Pelham scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Peel Island scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Pelham scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Peel Island or Pelham?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Peel Island has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.73% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
